name: Crookhaven
overview: Set at mysterious Crookhaven School, high achieving young crooks from across the world are secretly selected to hone their skills in disciplines such as Deception, Crimnastics, Forgery and Infiltration, learning how to use their skills for good and to do what is right in their own way.

trailers.title: You’ve Never Seen a School Like This… | Crookhaven Official Teaser
